_comment: Hermes Agent MCP configuration for cowork-to-code-bridge.
_usage: Copy this file to ~/.hermes/mcp.json (or wherever Hermes reads MCP config).
Or set HERMES_MCP_CONFIG=~/.hermes/mcp.json in your shell.
escalate_to_claude — delegate a task to your local Claude Code agent
call_remote        — run any whitelisted script via the bridge
call_mcp_tool      — proxy to a registered stdio MCP server on the host
